---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(UpSetR)
library(data.table)
```

```{r}
callset_long  <- fread("upset_long_callset.csv", header=FALSE, col.names=c("set","id"))
baseline_long <- fread("upset_long_baseline.csv", header=FALSE, col.names=c("set","id"))
```

```{r}
to_matrix <- function(dt) {
  dt <- unique(dt)
  mat <- dcast(dt, id ~ set, fun.aggregate=length, value.var="set")
  sets <- setdiff(names(mat), "id")
  mat[, (sets) := lapply(.SD, function(x) as.integer(x > 0)), .SDcols=sets]
  list(mat=mat, sets=sets)
}

x1 <- to_matrix(callset_long)
upset(x1$mat, sets=x1$sets, order.by="freq", nintersects=40)

x2 <- to_matrix(baseline_long)
upset(x2$mat, sets=x2$sets, order.by="freq", nintersects=40)
```
